description_long: This object consists of three aluminum cans, each featuring a distinct coffee-themed design and branding. The cans are labeled 'MR. COFFEE' and display a cartoon mascot of a man in a white hat holding a coffee cup, with coffee beans illustrated in the background. Each can has a different color scheme and flavor indication: blue for 'Blue Mountain', orange for 'Mandheling', and brown for 'Original'. The tops of the cans are metallic with standard pull-tab openings, showing signs of wear and slight discoloration. Nutritional information panels are visible on the back of the cans, and the surface graphics are slightly worn, suggesting urban use or exposure. The cans are grouped closely together, giving the impression of a multipack or a display arrangement.
description: A trio of worn, colorful MR. COFFEE aluminum cans featuring a cartoon mascot, flavor labels, and visible nutrition facts, grouped together.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue 'Blue Mountain' and brown 'Original' cans with the MR. COFFEE mascot and branding clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the orange 'Mandheling' can, with its flavor label and mascot most prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutrition facts panels on the brown and orange cans, with the 'Original' flavor label partially visible.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the blue can's plain side and the nutrition facts on the other two cans.
attribute_brand_logo: A cartoon man in a white hat holding a coffee cup, located on the front of each can, with 'MR. COFFEE' in bold white letters; dominant colors are white, brown, and red.
attribute_flavor_indication: Text labels and color cues indicate 'Blue Mountain', 'Mandheling', and 'Original' flavors on the respective cans.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutrition facts panels are visible on the back of the brown and orange cans, containing standard nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A cartoon mascot is prominently displayed on the front of each can, serving as a promotional graphic.
